title: Indulgent Glassy Filipino Mirin-hon Toast
description: A sweet and savory Filipino dish featuring a glassy-jelly glaze made with mirin-hon on toasted bread.

ingredients.name: Mirin-hon
ingredients.notes: available at Asian grocery stores or online

ingredients.name: Fish sauce
ingredients.notes: optional, omit for non-fish sauce flavor

instructions: Slice the brioche bread into 1-inch thick slices.
Arrange the slices on a baking sheet and toast in the oven for 5 minutes, or until lightly browned.
In a small saucepan, combine the mirin-hon, unsalted butter, and fish sauce (if using).
Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes, or until the glaze has thickened slightly.
Brush the glaze over the toasted bread slices and serve immediately.
